"Visitor Guidelines" ke antargat, mehmaanon ke liye niyam aur shartein di gayi hain, jaise ki anurodh kiya gaya hai ki ve apne saath koi bhi anadhikrit vastu na le kar aayen aur suraksha ke niyamon ka palan karein. Ismein yeh bhi bataya gaya hai ki mehmaanon ko apne ID pramaan patra saath rakhna chahiye aur anuchit vyavahar na karen. 

"Check-In Desk" ke section mein, mehmaanon ko apni pehchaan pramaan patra dikhakar check-in karne ke liye kaha gaya hai. Yahan par, unhe apne aagman ki jankari deni hoti hai aur pravesh ke liye anumati prapt karni hoti hai. Yeh prakriya suraksha aur suvidha ke liye bahut aavashyak hai.
"Visitor Guidelines" ke baad "Check-In Desk" ki list di gayi hai.

Yeh document "Account Settings" ke baare mein hai, jisme user apne account ki jankari badal sakta hai, jaise email, naam, aur profile photo. Iske baad "Password Reset" ka section aata hai, jahan user apna password badal sakta hai ya bhool gaya password reset kar sakta hai. Dono sections user ko apne account ko surakshit aur update rakhne ke liye madad karte hain.
"Account Settings" aur "Password Reset" ke beech mein, document mein "Account Settings" ko pehle list kiya gaya hai.

Yeh document "Health Benefits" ke baare mein jankari deta hai. Ismein health benefits ke fayde aur unka istemal kaise karein, iski jaankari di gayi hai. Iske baad "Enrollment Form" diya gaya hai, jisme vyakti apni details bhar kar health benefits ke liye register kar sakta hai. Overall, yeh document health benefits ke labhon ke baare mein aur unmein shamil hone ke liye avashyak form ke baare mein hai.

"Health Benefits" ke baad "Enrollment Form" se pehle, yeh document health benefits ke baare mein jankari deta hai. Ismein health se judi suvidhaon ke fayde aur enrollment process ke baare mein bataya gaya hai.
